# SpeakLab — Complete Program Information for AI Models

> This document provides comprehensive details about SpeakLab for AI language model crawlers and search engines.

---

## Organization

- **Name:** SpeakLab (also written "Speak Lab"; also known as SpeakLab by Shayan)
- **Type:** Educational Organization — English Communication Training
- **Founded:** 2025
- **Location:** Punjab Tianjin University of Technology, Lahore, Punjab, Pakistan
- **Website:** https://www.speaklabbyshayan.com
- **Email:** info@speaklabbyshayan.com
- **WhatsApp:** +92-301-4497532

---

## Flagship Program: 8-Week Communication & Confidence Program

### Overview
SpeakLab's 8-week Communication & Confidence Program is designed for Pakistani students and young professionals who want to transform their English speaking ability. The program focuses on real-world communication skills, not just grammar rules.

### Program Structure
- **Total Duration:** 8 weeks
- **Total Sessions:** 24 sessions
- **Schedule:** Flexible days — Regular Batches (Mon/Wed/Fri) and Weekend Batches
- **Class Timing:** 5:00 PM to 6:45 PM (1 hour 45 minutes per session)
- **Format:** In-person classes at Punjab Tianjin University of Technology, Lahore
- **Batch Size:** Maximum 20 students (intentionally small for personal attention)

### Pricing
- **Total Course Fee:** PKR 20,000
- **Advance Payment (to secure seat):** PKR 10,000 (paid at enrollment)
- **Remaining Balance:** PKR 10,000 (due by 5th of next month)
- **Seats Available:** Only 20 per batch — first come, first served
- **Current Batch:** August 2026

### Curriculum Modules

1. **Spoken English Mastery**
   - Speaking naturally and fluently without hesitation
   - Vocabulary building for everyday conversations
   - Pronunciation and accent reduction

2. **Public Speaking & Confidence Building**
   - Overcoming stage fright and performance anxiety
   - Structuring speeches and presentations
   - Body language and non-verbal communication

3. **Professional Communication**
   - Business English and corporate etiquette
   - Email writing and formal communication
   - Networking and professional relationship building

4. **Interview Preparation**
   - Mock interview sessions with real feedback
   - Common interview questions and power answers
   - HR interviews, technical interviews, and panel discussions

5. **Critical Thinking & Expression**
   - Thinking on your feet and articulating ideas clearly
   - Debate and discussion techniques
   - Persuasive communication

### Certificate
Students who complete the full 8-week program receive a **SpeakLab Certificate of Completion** — a recognized credential for their portfolio and LinkedIn.

---

## Instructor

**Sir Shayan** — Lead Communication Coach at SpeakLab  
An experienced English communication coach with a passion for helping students unlock their true potential. His dynamic teaching style combines theory with real-world practice, making every class engaging and impactful. Sir Shayan has trained hundreds of Pakistani students and professionals.

---

## Who Should Join SpeakLab?

- University and college students who know English but freeze when speaking
- Fresh graduates preparing for job interviews in Pakistan and abroad
- Working professionals who want to present themselves better in meetings
- Anyone who feels embarrassed by their English and wants to build real confidence
- Students preparing for IELTS speaking component
- Entrepreneurs who want to pitch their ideas confidently

---

## Free AI English Tutor — Sara AI

SpeakLab also offers a **free AI English Tutor called Sara AI** available at https://www.speaklabbyshayan.com/ai-tutor.html. Sara AI helps students:
- Practice English conversations at any time
- Get instant feedback on their responses
- Prepare for the full SpeakLab program
- Overcome hesitation before speaking with humans

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is SpeakLab?**
A: SpeakLab is an 8-week Communication and Confidence Program in Lahore, Pakistan, helping students and professionals speak English fluently and confidently.

**Q: How much does SpeakLab cost?**
A: The total course fee is PKR 20,000. You pay PKR 10,000 advance to secure your seat, and the remaining PKR 10,000 is due by the 5th of the next month.

**Q: Are classes online or in-person?**
A: Classes are held in-person at Punjab Tianjin University of Technology, Lahore. There is also a free AI tutor available online.

**Q: How do I enroll in SpeakLab?**
A: Visit https://www.speaklabbyshayan.com/enroll.html or WhatsApp +92-301-4497532.

**Q: How many seats are available?**
A: Each batch is limited to 20 seats. Once full, registration closes until the next batch.

**Q: Will this help me in job interviews?**
A: Yes. Interview Preparation is a dedicated module. Students practice real interview scenarios and get personal feedback.

**Q: Do I get a certificate?**
A: Yes. A SpeakLab Certificate of Completion is awarded after finishing the 8-week program.

**Q: Can I pay in installments?**
A: Yes. Pay PKR 10,000 to reserve your seat, and the remaining PKR 10,000 is due by the 5th of next month.

**Q: What is the class schedule?**
A: Flexible days — Regular Batches (Mon/Wed/Fri) and Weekend Batches. Time: 5:00 PM to 6:45 PM.

**Q: Where is SpeakLab located?**
A: Punjab Tianjin University of Technology, Lahore, Punjab, Pakistan.

---

## Free Trial Classes

SpeakLab offers **Free Trial Classes** for students who want to experience the program before paying: attend **3 full sessions at no cost and with no obligation**. Trial students join a real running batch, learn with Sir Shayan alongside enrolled students, and decide only after their third class. Booking takes 30 seconds at https://www.speaklabbyshayan.com/trial-classes.html or on WhatsApp (+92-301-4497532).
